title: FrameEdge
description: FrameEdge: A frame edge (eg mullion, window jamb, curtain wall sill, etc)

Curve.description: The curve representing the frame edge location ICurve: The interface for all one-dimensional geometrical objects.

FrameEdgeProperty.description: The property assigned to this frame edge FrameEdgeProperty: Frame edge (eg mullion, window jamb, curtain wall sill, etc) property with list of Profile Section properties that make up the mullion construction.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
